name: 🐶Maverick "Mav" Huang
description:
Mav can't wait to see a Florida man in real life- wait why is there only one bed?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟞𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｂｅｓｔ　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

I AM SO SORRY OML. You put this request in when I just hit 2k. TWO THOUSAND. That was ages ago- If you're still here I hope you enjoy him and please know I am super sorry :((. Thank you so much for your request it was such a fun read 😭

He's such a goofball you guys I love him so much. Also this is my first demi-human bot so I'm sorry if it's wonky, feel free to give me suggestions if there's issues😔. Also guys. This is request 8. Request 8 out of 63. SIXTY THREE. You guys are insane (im kidding I love you all keep em coming and I'll try my best to do em ;)). Looks like I'll be in the kitchen for quite a while 😈🙏

Also I just want to say he most definitely put up a fight when he found out that you guys couldn't be roommates- trust me when I say he sulked for weeks 💀

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Demihuman definition from @Kleob!!

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Art is by @Pixzli on Twitter! Thanks to my boy @Foxy_Haeven for coming in clutch 😈🙏
